summary: Well-structured test suite with comprehensive coverage of all three retention policies (MaxAgeDays, KeepLatestPerWorkflow, MaxTotalBytes) via both Pester unit tests and end-to-end validation through a sophisticated GitHub Actions harness. Unit tests are clearly organized with excellent fixture design and helper functions; the harness runs three realistic scenarios and validates exact output values. However, rigor gaps include missing edge case tests: empty artifact lists, 0 or negative policy parameters, artifacts with identical CreatedAt timestamps, MaxTotalBytes smaller than individual artifacts, and behavior with duplicate artifact names. The fixture files (fixtures/sample.json, fixtures/keep-latest.json) referenced by the harness are not provided in the code block, though the harness structure itself is well-designed and would work once fixtures are in place. Tests would catch regressions in main functionality but lack thoroughness in boundary conditions.
